title: rubus × leviniacus
intro: Rubus × leviniacus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or hybrid thimbleberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus leucodermis and Rubus ursinus. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and potential anti-cancer effects. The health benefits of Rubus × leviniacus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or jam, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried leaves, roots, and fruits.
